calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
The matter is ordered off calendar per plaintiff's request.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Reset To Oct-16-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
Petitioner, Elaine Fu, present in pro per (for minor), with Chinese translator Sophia Chanz. Parties were sworn and examined. Petition lacks father's signature.
The Court continues the matter to October 16, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept 218 for service on father.
